root_text.an3.47:1.3: Uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyati.
root_text.an3.47:1.4: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi saṅkhatassa saṅkhatalakkhaṇānī”ti.
root_text.an3.47:2.3: Na uppādo paññāyati, na vayo paññāyati, na ṭhitassa aññathattaṁ paññāyati.
root_text.an3.47:2.4: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi asaṅkhatassa asaṅkhatalakkhaṇānī”ti.

translation_text.an3.47:1.1: “Mendicants, the conditioned has these three characteristics.
translation_text.an3.47:1.3: Arising is evident, vanishing is evident, and change while persisting is evident.
translation_text.an3.47:1.4: These are the three characteristics of the conditioned.”
translation_text.an3.47:2.3: No arising is evident, no vanishing is evident, and no change while persisting is evident.
translation_text.an3.47:2.4: These are the three characteristics of the unconditioned.”
